---
title: "About"
description: "The ABI Training Working Group"
toc: true
---

## The ABI Training Working Group

---

## Core Team

**Verena Ras** — Training Coordination and Development

**Shaun Aron** — Training Coordination and Development

**Melek Chaouch** — Training Coordination and Development

### Assisting team

**Jorge Batista da Rocha** - Site setup and training support


---

## License

MyProject is released under the Creative Commons Attribution (CC BY). 


## Contact & Community
- 📬 [info@bioinformaticsinstitute.africa](mailto:info@bioinformaticsinstitute.africa) — for any questions.
